discovery.purpose: Machine-readable evidence-preserving repair policy for ASIEP v0.1 validation errors.

evidence_preservation_rules: Do not forge gate reports, approvals, external references, or evidence digests.
Do not change safety regression evidence from true to false to force validation success.
Do not relax flip-count thresholds to force validation success.
Do not invent evidence ids, URIs, or hashes without marking them as external evidence requirements.
Do not modify production or deployment state.
Prefer reject decisions over unsafe promotion when evidence does not support promotion.
After any agent applies a repair plan, rerun the ASIEP validator before review or promotion.

allowed_actions: add JSON Patch skeleton for the missing required field
forbidden_actions: invent external evidence values without marking the action as externally required
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Add a TODO placeholder only when the missing value must be supplied by an agent or human.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add the missing required field at the reported json_path.

allowed_actions: replace the field with a schema-compatible value skeleton
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Point the agent to the schema type and require semantic review.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Change the field value to the schema-required type.

allowed_actions: reorder lifecycle events while preserving event ids, timestamps, actors, and evidence_refs
forbidden_actions: delete lifecycle evidence to hide invalid transitions
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Reconstruct the lifecycle according to docs/state_machine.md and preserve all event evidence.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Reorder lifecycle events to follow the ASIEP state machine.

allowed_actions: request a real evidence object for the missing ref
update the ref to a real existing evidence id
forbidden_actions: invent an evidence object without marking external evidence required
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Ask an agent or human to provide a real evidence object or correct the reference.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add the missing evidence object or update the reference to an existing evidence id.

allowed_actions: replace digest with a real SHA-256 digest computed from the referenced evidence
forbidden_actions: use a placeholder digest without marking external evidence required
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Request the true digest from the evidence producer.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Set digest.algorithm to sha256 and digest.value to a real 64-character hexadecimal SHA-256 digest.

allowed_actions: request a real gate_report_ref
add a JSON Patch skeleton that points to TODO real gate report evidence
forbidden_actions: invent gate_report_ref as if it already exists
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require a real gate report from the gatekeeper agent before promotion.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add gates[].gate_report_ref pointing to real gate_report evidence.

allowed_actions: replace unsafe promote decision with reject
request reevaluation and a new gate report if promotion is still desired
forbidden_actions: change regression from true to false
change failed safety check to passed without new evidence
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Reject the promotion unless a new evaluation and real gate report justify a future promotion.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Do not promote when safety regression is true.

allowed_actions: replace unsafe promote decision with reject
request reevaluation if promotion is still desired
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Reject the promotion unless new evaluation evidence brings flip counts within threshold.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Do not promote while flip counts exceed thresholds.

allowed_actions: request real rollback_report evidence
add rollback field skeleton marked as external evidence required
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require a real rollback report before representing the profile as rolled back.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add rollback.evidence_ref pointing to evidence with type rollback_report.

allowed_actions: restore missing evidence object
correct broken refs to existing evidence
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Ask the evidence-producing agent to restore or correct the evidence chain.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Restore the referenced evidence object or update the evidence refs to close the chain.

allowed_actions: provide the real artifact file at the declared bundle-relative path
correct the artifact path to a real in-bundle file
forbidden_actions: write placeholder content as if it were evidence
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require the evidence-producing agent to supply the real missing artifact or correct the reference.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Provide the real artifact file at the declared bundle-relative path or correct the artifact declaration.

allowed_actions: verify artifact version with the evidence producer
replace artifact with the expected version
update expected digest only after external confirmation
forbidden_actions: blindly replace expected digest with actual digest
treat mismatched artifact as valid evidence without review
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Block promotion until an agent or human confirms whether the artifact or expected digest is authoritative.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Verify the evidence version; do not replace expected digest with actual digest unless an external review confirms the artifact is correct.

allowed_actions: reject the unsafe bundle path
move the real artifact inside bundle_root and declare a safe relative path
forbidden_actions: turn path escape into a valid reference automatically
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Stop resolution and require a safe in-bundle path.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Reject this bundle path and require a safe path inside bundle_root.

allowed_actions: declare an existing real artifact in bundle artifacts
correct the evidence URI to an already declared real artifact
forbidden_actions: declare a URI that has no real local file
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Add a bundle artifact declaration only when a real local artifact and digest are available.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Declare the real artifact in bundle artifacts or correct the evidence URI.

allowed_actions: remove the unused artifact declaration if it is not needed by the evidence record
forbidden_actions: delete artifact files that may be used by another bundle
edit the evidence record only to consume unused artifacts
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Remove unused artifact declarations from bundle.json after confirming they are not intended evidence.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Remove the unused artifact declaration if it is not needed by the evidence record.

allowed_actions: repair bundle.json to match interfaces/asiep_evidence_bundle.schema.json
forbidden_actions: drop required integrity or access fields to hide a bundle issue
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Make the bundle manifest schema-valid before digest resolution.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Repair bundle.json so it conforms to interfaces/asiep_evidence_bundle.schema.json.

allowed_actions: correct media_type declaration
provide artifact in the declared media type
forbidden_actions: ignore media type mismatch when downstream agents depend on it
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Align media_type with the real artifact content.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Correct the media_type declaration or provide the artifact in the declared media type.

allowed_actions: provide the real ASIEP evidence record
correct evidence_record_path to an in-bundle record
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require the actual ASIEP evidence record before resolving artifacts.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Provide the real ASIEP evidence record at evidence_record_path or correct the bundle manifest.

allowed_actions: review bundle manifest changes
update manifest hash only after confirming manifest contents are correct
forbidden_actions: blindly update bundle_manifest_hash to silence the resolver
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require review of bundle.json before accepting a new manifest hash.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Review bundle.json changes and update the manifest hash only after confirming the manifest is correct.

allowed_actions: repair the import request or fixture to match the declared interface schema
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Make the request and fixture schema-valid before importing.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Repair the request or fixture so it conforms to the relevant interface schema.

allowed_actions: change source_type to a supported local fixture type
forbidden_actions: call external APIs to compensate for an unsupported source
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Use a supported local source type.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Use one of the supported_import_sources declared in profiles/asiep/v0.1/profile.json.

allowed_actions: provide the real local source fixture
correct source_path
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Require the source trace fixture to exist locally.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Provide the local source fixture or correct source_path.

allowed_actions: provide real source evidence for the missing role
disable the requirement only if policy permits
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Stop import until the required role is present in the local fixture.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Provide real source evidence for the missing role; do not fabricate gate reports, candidate diffs, feedback, or score artifacts.

allowed_actions: replace raw content with refs
redact sensitive content
use full_content_for_test_only only for synthetic tests
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Keep import in ref_only mode and remove raw sensitive content from the fixture.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Remove raw sensitive content, replace it with external refs or redacted summaries, or explicitly use a test-only policy.

allowed_actions: add local role markers
complete source metadata needed by import_policy
forbidden_actions: guess missing accountability roles without source evidence
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Complete role mapping before generating ASIEP evidence.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Add source role markers or mapping metadata required by import_policy.json.

allowed_actions: fix local output directory permissions
choose a writable output_bundle_dir
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Fix local filesystem access and rerun importer.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Check output_bundle_dir permissions and rerun the local importer.

allowed_actions: inspect resolver errors
regenerate bundle from source fixture
forbidden_actions: edit digests by hand to force resolver success
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Regenerate the bundle and verify with asiep_resolver.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Inspect resolver errors and regenerate the bundle without editing digests by hand.

allowed_actions: inspect validator errors
repair source mapping or import policy
forbidden_actions: forge required evidence to satisfy validator
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Regenerate ASIEP evidence after fixing mapping defects.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Inspect validator errors and repair source mapping or import policy.

allowed_actions: change request or fixture to comply with import_policy
forbidden_actions: inline raw sensitive content by default
error_code_repair_map.default_strategy: Align the request with the machine-readable import policy.
error_code_repair_map.remediation_hint: Change the request or source fixture to comply with profiles/asiep/v0.1/import_policy.json.
